title: We spent weeks testing text vs. image retrieval for RAG. The winner? 𝗡𝗲𝗶𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿. Our recent pu...
event_type: Weaviate publishes comparison of text vs image retrieval for RAG
claims: ["Text edges out images at top rank, but images match or exceed text at deeper recall levels.", "Neither approach alone is necessarily better; they fail on different queries.", "Multimodal hybrid search gives the best of both worlds."]
core_facts: ["Tested retrieval over 3,230 pages from 166 scientific papers using 180 needle-in-the-haystack queries.", "Text-based retrieval (Arctic 2.0 + BM25 hybrid search): 46% Recall@1, 78% Recall@5, 91% Recall@20.", "Image-based retrieval (ColModernVBERT multi-vector embeddings): 43% Recall@1, 78% Recall@5, 93% Recall@20.", "Multimodal hybrid search: 49% Recall@1, 81% Recall@5, 95% Recall@20.", "At Recall@1, 22 queries succeeded with text but failed with images; 18 queries succeeded with images but failed with text."]
summary: Weaviate shares results comparing text-based retrieval (Arctic 2.0+BM25) and image-based retrieval (ColModernVBERT) for RAG on PDFs. Text achieves 46%/78%/91% Recall@1/@5/@20, image achieves 43%/78%/93%, and multimodal hybrid achieves 49%/81%/95%. They find the methods fail on different queries, suggesting fusion is best.

event_type: 论文提出对抗优化需要非对抗判别器，Cross-Time Replay在自博弈中选择最佳模型版本
claims: ["互斗写书，越斗越偏——自博弈会导致模型只关注极端题而丢失通用知识。", "对抗坍缩在循环内部无法被察觉，需要外部判别器。", "Cross-Time Replay 是论文的灵魂，提供了不参与对抗的判别方式。"]
core_facts: ["论文 Ctx2Skill 提出自博弈方法，让一个模型出题、一个解题、第三方判分，自动生成技能手册。", "在 GPT-4.1 上运行固定5个回合，Reasoner 手册性能单调下降。", "作者将性能下降归因于对抗坍缩 (adversarial collapse)。", "Cross-Time Replay 方法在每个回合保存难易探针，循环结束后选择 ρ_h × ρ_e 最大的手册版本。"]
summary: 论文Ctx2Skill提出自博弈方法让模型自动从文档中提炼技能，但出现对抗坍缩导致性能下降，Cross-Time Replay通过保留难易探针选择最佳版本解决此问题。
